# freeswitch_callcenter_queue (Resource)

A mod_callcenter queue (served to FreeSWITCH from the control-plane DB).

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "freeswitch_callcenter_queue" "support" {
  name = "support@192.168.48.143"

  # defaults: longest-idle-agent strategy, local_stream://moh,
  # discard-abandoned-after 60s
  strategy  = "longest-idle-agent"
  moh_sound = "local_stream://moh"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Queue name, e.g. `support@192.168.48.143`.

### Optional

- `abandoned_resume_allowed` (Boolean)
- `discard_abandoned_after` (Number)
- `max_wait_time` (Number)
- `max_wait_time_with_no_agent` (Number)
- `max_wait_time_with_no_agent_time_reached` (Number)
- `moh_sound` (String)
- `params` (Map of String) Extra queue params merged into the rendered XML.
- `strategy` (String)
- `tier_rule_no_agent_no_wait` (Boolean)
- `tier_rule_wait_multiply_level` (Boolean)
- `tier_rule_wait_second` (Number)
- `tier_rules_apply` (Boolean)
- `time_base_score` (String)

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `updated_at` (String)

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# freeswitch_callcenter_queue is imported by its name.
terraform import freeswitch_callcenter_queue.support "support@192.168.48.143"
```
